title: Internal Ops Dashboard
summary: Replaced three SaaS subscriptions with one custom dashboard the team fully owns.
body:
## The problem

The operations team was paying for three overlapping SaaS tools — one for tracking, one for reporting, one for scheduling — and still stitching the gaps together in spreadsheets.

## What we built

A single internal dashboard that pulls from the same data sources, tailored to the team's actual workflow instead of a vendor's idea of it.

- Live shipment tracking board
- One-click weekly reports
- Role-based access for warehouse and office staff

## Outcome

The three subscriptions were cancelled within a quarter, and the tool now runs on infrastructure the client controls.
